calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

The judgment debtor's Claim of Exemption is granted. Parties failed to appear as directed in the Court's tentative ruling.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer: W. Trupek, Not reported (302/RBU)
